response:
CANDIDATE_PARTIAL: (Country(attolia) & Near(attolia, medeEmpire))
CANDIDATE_OVERWEAK: (Country(attolia) | Country(sounis))
CANDIDATE_OVERSTRONG: ((Country(attolia) & Near(attolia, medeEmpire)) & (Country(sounis) & Near(sounis, medeEmpire)) & Country(medeEmpire))
CANDIDATE_GIBBERISH: (Near(attolia, sounis) & Country(medeEmpire))
